title: How to Run a TIFIN RM Client Portfolio Diagnostic
intro: Learn how to access and initiate a comprehensive diagnostic report for your client or family office portfolios. This guide will help you quickly analyze key metrics like AUM, asset allocation, and top holdings to better serve your clients.
